key_components: ModuleCategorySchema - Enum for module types (core, feature, ai, integration, example, stub)
ModuleStatusSchema - Enum for module lifecycle states
ModuleManifestSchema - Zod validation schema for module.json manifests
ModuleLoader class - Injectable service for module discovery, validation, and lifecycle management
Module discovery across multiple directory patterns (_core, _examples, _stubs)
Module lifecycle hooks (onLoad, onEnable, onDisable, onUnload)

patterns_discovered.description: Follows WordPress plugin pattern with manifests, hooks, and lifecycle management
patterns_discovered.evidence: ModuleInstance interface with onLoad, onEnable, onDisable, onUnload hooks

patterns_discovered.description: Comprehensive runtime validation of module manifests using Zod schemas
patterns_discovered.evidence: ModuleManifestSchema with nested schemas for dependencies, routes, database, hooks, admin, events, plan restrictions

patterns_discovered.description: Uses @injectable decorator and constructor injection for Prisma dependency
Implements graph traversal algorithm to determine module load order
patterns_discovered.evidence: resolveDependencies() method with visiting/visited sets for cycle detection

patterns_discovered.description: Manifests support complex nested configurations for routes, database, admin, events

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Windows path separators in category detection
gotchas_discovered.description: Path checks use both forward slashes (Unix) and backslashes (Windows) inconsistently
gotchas_discovered.fix_needed: Use path.sep or normalize paths for cross-platform compatibility

gotchas_discovered.description: Optional dependencies that are missing don't cause load failures but may cause runtime errors
gotchas_discovered.location: resolveDependencies method - optional dependencies are visited but failures ignored
gotchas_discovered.implication: Modules might load but fail at runtime if optional dependencies are actually needed

gotchas_discovered.description: Detected category from path overwrites any category specified in manifest
gotchas_discovered.implication: Manifest category field is effectively ignored

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Core modules cannot be disabled (enforced at property level)
gotchas_discovered.description: Core modules are marked with core: true but no runtime enforcement prevents disabling
gotchas_discovered.location: ModuleManifestSchema allows both core and enabled properties independently
gotchas_discovered.implication: Need additional validation in disable() method to prevent disabling core modules

notes: Complete module loader implementation with 877 lines of well-documented code
Includes full lifecycle management from discovery through loading and activation
Robust validation using Zod schemas with helpful error messages
Proper separation of concerns with distinct methods for discovery, validation, dependency resolution, and loading
Injectable service ready for integration with DI container
Comprehensive JSDoc comments explaining each method and interface
Includes example usage in documentation comments

recommendations.description: Replace manual path separator checks with path.normalize() or platform-agnostic comparisons

recommendations.recommendation: Add core module protection in disable method
recommendations.description: Implement validation to prevent disabling modules with core: true
Document whether optional dependencies that are missing should cause load warnings or errors
Allow manifest-specified categories to override path-detected categories only when explicit
Consider adding explicit 'capabilities' field to manifests for feature detection
